name: Void Weave Implants
text: During your tactical actions, you can activate systems that contain your command tokens and no other player's ships. Your systems can contain more than one of your command tokens.

name: Weave Spinner
text: ACTION: Exhaust this card to place a Command Token from your reinforcement in up to 2 systems that are adjacent to a system that contains one of your command tokens.

name: Psychic Disturbance
text: You may exhaust this card at the start of a ground combat on a planet you control. If your ground forces make 1 or more hits in the first combat round, move all your opponents ground forces on the planet to the space area. The combat ends in a draw.

name: Inscrutable Designs
text: When you activate a system that contains another player's units, you may allow both of you to either draw 1 action card or gain 1 trade good.
